author: y4rr
content: Result: Implemented Faster R-CNN with ResNet-50 FPN backbone (#456 partial). Files added: ferrotorch-vision/src/models/detection/{mod.rs,faster_rcnn.rs,fpn.rs,rpn.rs,anchor_utils.rs}. Registered in model registry + ferrotorch-hub. Conformance test: tests/conformance_vision_detection.rs — 18 tests all pass. Existing 56 ferrotorch-vision tests pass with zero regressions. Workspace clippy: 0 errors. Architecture: ResNet-50 backbone (reused) -> FPN (5 levels, 256ch) -> RPN (anchor gen + NMS) -> ROI Align (7x7) -> TwoMlpHead (1024-dim, 91 classes). Follow-up issues filed: Mask R-CNN #964, SSD #965.
